patch.value: Group exported items into markdown sections.

author: codex

patch.value: Shipped --group-by status|sprint|type for markdown and tasklist export. groupItems buckets by field with (unassigned) sorted last. Default markdown (no group-by or group-by status) kept byte-identical (renderDefaultMarkdown unit-tested against exact historical layout).

message: Shipped --group-by status|sprint|type for markdown and tasklist export. groupItems buckets by field with (unassigned) sorted last. Default markdown (no group-by or group-by status) kept byte-identical (renderDefaultMarkdown unit-tested against exact historical layout).
